title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok Capital India:
Walker Chandiok Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok Capital India!
